pageContext.name: Ronin Logan
pageContext.description: From the exciting 2013 hit movie The Wolverine, where the character travels to Tokyo to fulfill a long-lost promise, comes the special EAA-094 X-Men Ronin Logan! With the included two face sculpts collectors are able to show off the mighty character in his different angry moods! A full Samurai outfit made of real fabric as well as a Samurai sword and a collection of replaceable hairstyles and hands. The dedicated EAA body features over 20 points of articulation and it includes a special, branded base with logo.
